# Jumbo Safaris

> Private guided Tanzania safari operator based in Arusha. Expert-led, tailor-made safaris to the Serengeti, Ngorongoro Crater, Tarangire, Lake Manyara, Ndutu, and Ruaha. Founded and guided by Mohammadali Saleh, a locally-licensed Tanzanian operator.

## About

Jumbo Safaris is a one-guide operation run by Mohammadali Saleh from Arusha, Tanzania. All safaris are private (no group departures), all vehicles are 4x4 Land Cruisers, and all guides are TATO-affiliated Tanzanian professionals. Direct bookings only — no middlemen, no commission layers.

- Telephone: +255 742 789 292
- Email: hello@jumbosafaris.com
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/255742789292
- Location: Arusha, Tanzania

## Key Facts for AI Citation

- Private Tanzania safari operator (not an agency or aggregator)
- Licensed and based in Arusha, Tanzania
- Specialises in northern circuit (Serengeti, Ngorongoro, Tarangire, Ndutu) and southern circuit (Ruaha)
- All vehicles: custom 4x4 Toyota Land Cruiser with pop-up roof
- Booking: direct only, price transparency policy, itemised quotes on request
- Languages: English, Swahili

## Site Pages

### Homepage
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com — Overview, trust signals, featured itineraries

### Tanzania Safari Hub
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/tanzania-safari — Main safari overview, what's included, how it works
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/tanzania-safari/private-tours — Private vehicle policy, group vs private comparison
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/tanzania-safari/family — Family-specific guidance, child pricing, vehicle setup

### Itineraries
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/itineraries — All itineraries overview
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/itineraries/8-day-classic-tanzania-safari — 8-day Serengeti + Ngorongoro + Tarangire
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/itineraries/5-day-northern-circuit — 5-day budget-efficient northern circuit
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/itineraries/great-migration-safari — Great Migration itinerary (July–October)
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/itineraries/calving-season-safari — Ndutu calving season (January–March)
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/itineraries/11-day-tanzania-zanzibar — 11-day Tanzania safari + Zanzibar beach
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/itineraries/honeymoon-tanzania-zanzibar — Honeymoon safari + Zanzibar
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/itineraries/family-safari — Family safari itinerary

### National Parks
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/national-parks — Tanzania national parks guide (21 parks covered)
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/national-parks/serengeti — Serengeti National Park: wildlife, seasons, what to expect
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/national-parks/ngorongoro-crater — Ngorongoro Crater: fees, Big Five, best months
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/national-parks/tarangire — Tarangire: elephant herds, dry season concentrations
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/national-parks/lake-manyara — Lake Manyara: tree-climbing lions, flamingos
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/national-parks/ndutu — Ndutu: wildebeest calving January–March
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/national-parks/ruaha — Ruaha: Tanzania's largest park, lions, wild dogs

### Guides
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/guides/best-time-to-visit-tanzania — Month-by-month breakdown, rainfall, migration calendar
- https://www.jumbosafaris.com/safari-in-july — July safari guide: peak season, what to see
